calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: E1/E2 parallel rollout with trained agent -- MECH-135 diagnostic (post-EXQ-104)
MECH-135 discriminative pair: E1 co-evolution vs frozen z_world plan selection
MECH-098 reafference discriminative pair (proper data collection)
items.note: Fixes data collection bottleneck: separate low-hazard collection env (size=8, 1 hazard, threshold=0.04) gives 7000+ locomotion samples. Pre-registered C1=0.10, C2=1.15x, C3 directional.

items.title: SD-007 discriminative pair: REAF_ON vs REAF_OFF (governance decision)
items.note: Decision-grade evidence for SD-007 before 2026-03-31 deadline. REAF_ON vs REAF_OFF using LSTM predictor (all-transitions training). Pre-registered C1=0.10, C2=1.15x, C3=pair_pass_count>=2. Outcomes: retain_ree | hybridize | retire_ree_claim.

items.title: MECH-071 harm_eval trained vs random discriminative pair (EVB-0005)
items.note: Decision-grade evidence for MECH-071 before 2026-03-31 deadline. Within-run comparison: E3.harm_eval_head TRAINED vs RANDOM on same z_world states. 6x6 grid, proxy fields, nav_bias=0.40. Pre-registered C1=calib_gap_trained>=0.08, C2=calib_gap_random<=0.04, C3=delta>=0.05, C4=graded model, C5=events. Outcomes: retain_ree | hybridize | retire_ree_claim.
